executives.name: Badri Kothandaraman
executives.background: Badri Kothandaraman joined Enphase in April 2017 as Chief Operating Officer and was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer in September 2017. Prior to joining Enphase, he served in various capacities at Cypress Semiconductor for 21 years, including Executive Vice President of the Data Communications Division.

executives.name: Brad Buss
executives.background: Former CFO of SolarCity and Cypress Semiconductor. Director at Tesla and Advance Auto Parts.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer / EVP - Finance and Administration

executives.name: Hassane El-Khoury
executives.background: Hassane El-Khoury has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since December 2020. Prior to joining the Company, Mr. El-Khoury served as President, Chief Executive Officer and a member of the board of directors of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation from August 2016 until its sale to Infineon Technologies AG in April 2020.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director

executives.name: Thad Trent
executives.background: Thad Trent has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since February 2021. Prior to joining the Company, Mr. Trent served as Chief Financial Officer of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation from 2014 until its sale to Infineon Technologies AG in April 2020.

executives.name: Thurman Rodgers
executives.background: T.J. Rodgers has served as a director since January 2017. He is the founder and former CEO of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation.
